CVE-2025-4432.title: A flaw was found in Rust's Ring package. A panic may be triggered ...
CVE-2025-4432.description: A flaw was found in Rust's Ring package. A panic may be triggered when overflow checking is enabled. In the QUIC protocol, this flaw allows an attacker to induce this panic by sending a specially crafted packet. It will likely occur unintentionally in 1 out of every 2**32 packets sent or received.

CVE-2026-41988.title: uuid before 14.0.0 can make unexpected writes when external outpu ...
CVE-2026-41988.description: uuid before 14.0.0 can make unexpected writes when external output buffers are used, and the UUID version is 3, 5, or 6. In particular, UUID version 4, which is very commonly used, is unaffected by this issue.
